title: citrus medica subf. hassaku
intro: Citrus medica subf. hassaku is a subcategory of the citrus medica plant, specifically a variety of the yuzu family, known for its unique flavor profile and medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds like limonene and β-citronellal, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Citrus medica subf. hassaku include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, essential oils, and extracts, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
